visual_dna.description: Analysis of Pinterest's Minimalism board design language. The style exhibits clean, simple aesthetics focused on clarity and functionality.

primary.role: Background, primary content areas, emphasizing cleanliness

secondary.role: Text, icons, elements requiring strong contrast, providing visual hierarchy

accent.role: Subtle dividers, card backgrounds, background elements. Provides subtle contrast without distraction

grayscale_range.role: Secondary text, muted icons. Used where less emphasis is needed.
Separator lines, disabled states (lighter than the previous gray).

font_families.family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, "Fira Sans", "Droid Sans", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif
font_families.role: Primary font for headings, body text, and UI elements. Promotes readability and a modern feel.

typography.notes: Font weights vary based on the content priority. Bolder weights for headings and important information, lighter weights for contextual details.

radii.role: Used in card corners, buttons, and other UI elements. The default radius is subtle and modern.

shadows.role: Subtle shadows enhance depth and separation of elements, making the UI feel more layered and tangible.

visual_language.spacing: Generous use of whitespace around elements.
visual_language.vibe: Clean, functional, and modern. Emphasizes simplicity and readability, avoids unnecessary ornamentation. Promotes content visibility and user-friendliness.

animations.details: Focus is on smooth transitions rather than flashy animations. Intended to enhance user experience without being distracting. Animations are used sparingly to draw attention to important changes or interactions.

families: System-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, Noto Sans, sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Segoe UI Symbol, Noto Color Emoji

visualLanguage.vibe: Clean, modern, playful, approachable, professional with a design-focused aesthetic.

elements.cards: Rounded corners, subtle shadows, clean layouts
elements.icons: Line icons primarily, filled icons secondary
elements.buttons: Rounded corners, distinct color variations, hover effects
elements.layout: Centered content, whitespace-driven design, grid-based layouts

animations.hovers: Subtle color changes and scale enlargements on hover, button and image transitions
animations.loading: Simple loading spinners or progress bars
animations.scroll: Smooth scroll animations may be used, mostly simple transitions.

performance.notes: Animations are likely simple and performant to maintain a smooth user experience. Overly complex animations are unlikely.
